name: Atal Pension Yojana
description: Contributory pension scheme designed to provide a guaranteed monthly pension after age 60 to eligible subscribers.

benefit.amount: INR 1,000 to INR 5,000 per month after age 60
benefit.description: The pension amount depends on the subscriber's chosen contribution slab and entry age, subject to current scheme rules.

other_conditions: Applicant must have a savings bank or post-office savings account and meet current APY eligibility conditions.

required_documents: Bank or Post Office Savings Account Details

application.portal: Pension Fund Regulatory and Development Authority

benefits.financial: INR 1,000 to INR 5,000 monthly pension after age 60

ai_explanation.summary: Contributory pension option for eligible adults planning income after age 60.
ai_explanation.eligibility_reason_template: Confirm your age, savings account, and eligibility before selecting a pension contribution slab.
tips: Choose a contribution amount you can maintain regularly.
frequently_asked_questions: What pension amount can I choose?
next_steps: Contact your bank or post office.
Submit the APY enrolment form and mandate.

source.organization: Pension Fund Regulatory and Development Authority

name: Indira Gandhi National Old Age Pension Scheme
description: Social-assistance pension for eligible older persons from households covered under the applicable poverty criteria, implemented with State and Union Territory support.

benefit.amount: Central assistance of INR 200 to INR 500 per month
benefit.description: Central assistance is INR 200 per month for eligible persons aged 60 to 79 and INR 500 from age 80; States or Union Territories may add their own contribution.

other_conditions: Applicant must meet the applicable poverty-status and State or Union Territory verification criteria under the National Social Assistance Programme.

benefits.financial: Central assistance of INR 200 to INR 500 per month, plus any State or UT top-up

ai_explanation.summary: Monthly social-assistance pension for eligible older persons under NSAP.
ai_explanation.eligibility_reason_template: Confirm poverty-status criteria and the local application process with the Gram Panchayat, municipality, or social-welfare office.
common_rejection_reasons: Age or poverty criteria not met
tips: Ask about State or Union Territory pension top-ups when applying.
frequently_asked_questions: Can State pension support be added?
next_steps: Submit the pension application with age and bank documents.

source.organization: Ministry of Rural Development, National Social Assistance Programme
